channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: OpenAI's Playbook For Managing AI
item.description: OpenAI's response to an AI mental health crisis reveals a four-step playbook every workplace leader needs now.

item.title: Dario Amodei Doubled Down On His AI Jobs Warning. Here’s What’s Different Now
item.description: From MIT’s Iceberg Index to Deutsche Bank’s" redundancy washing" warning, the evidence tells a messier story.

item.title: Prompt Engineering Finally Proves That Prompt Repetition Gives Better Answers But Only If You Do So These Ways
item.description: Prompt engineering finally and formally has added prompt repetition to the approved prompts. Include this in your toolkit and skillset. An AI Insider ...

item.title: Trump team livid about Dario Amodei’s principled stand to keep the Defense Department from using his AI tools for warlike purposes
item.description: Anthropic might lose its $200 million Defense Department contract after the company questioned how its AI model was used during the Maduro raid.

item.title: Jerome Powell knows the Fed’s balance sheet got too big—Kevin Warsh has a plan, he just has to sell it without freaking out the markets
item.description: "I've got a lot of sympathy for Warsh's view. But the transition from here to where he wants to get, could be problematic."

item.title: Horror Thriller ‘Return To Silent Hill’ New On Streaming This Week, Report Says
item.description: "Return to Silent Hill," a horror thriller based on Konami’s hit 2001 video game "Silent Hill 2," is reportedly coming to digital streaming this week....

item.title: Detroit automakers ask White House to be spared from new tariffs
item.description: The American Automotive Policy Council, which represents GM, Ford and Jeep-maker Stellantis, sent a letter to Trump’s trade team on Friday.

item.title: Trump loves cheap gas—but a military conflict in Iran could nearly double your price at the pump
item.description: As Trump builds the biggest military force since 2003 outside Iran, the U.S. impacts could swing from $2.50 to $5 gasoline.

item.title: No Stellantis, A Return To Diesel Isn’t The Answer To Your EV Problems
item.description: Stellantis appears to be combatting its sluggish electric sales with a reemphasis on diesel models, just when it looks like 2026 could be the European...

item.title: New CBO report shows national debt spiraling into uncharted territory by 2035—and Trump’s tariff defeat will make the picture even worse
item.description: By 2035, the CBO expects the deficit to reach $2.96 trillion or 6.2% of GDP versus 5.8% today, and almost double the multi-decade, pre-pandemic averag...

item.title: This once-hot cancer-detection company’s stock fell 50% after a failed trial
Why Nvidia is ‘highly motivated’ to keep investing in OpenAI
Deadliest jobs in America revealed
item.description: The United States Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that there were more than 5,000 deadly work injuries recorded in the nation in 2024.

item.title: Will refunds be issued after Supreme Court ruling on Trump tariffs?
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump's IEEPA tariffs, which could open the door to billions of dollars in tariff refunds, though the r...

item.title: US economy grew slower than expected in fourth quarter
item.description: The U.S. economy grew at a rate of 1.4% in the fourth quarter of 2025, according to an estimate released on Friday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

item.title: How should businesses approach tariff refunds?
item.description: Trade experts note that businesses seeking tariff refunds may need to appeal to CBP or the Court of International Trade to get their money back after ...

item.title: Fed's favored inflation gauge showed consumer price growth remained elevated in December
item.description: The Commerce Department released the PCE inflation report on Friday, which showed the Fed's favored inflation gauge remained elevated as consumers dea...

item.title: Prediction-market ETFs may open the door to all sorts of Wall Street tomfoolery
Don’t expect lower prices now that the Supreme Court struck down Trump’s tariffs
Dow gains 230 points, stocks end higher after SCOTUS rules against Trump tariffs
Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
